positive: Abstract liquid gold ink spill forming the shape of a roaring tiger head. Luxurious, highly textured, and fluid art composition. Style: Marble effect, resin pour art, high contrast, deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, gold).
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, solid color, simple, sketchy, flat design
